titleStmt.title: SII 39.166: original edition by K. Karuppiah
No. 166. (A.R. No. 166 of 1916.) TIRUPPUKKUḺI, CONJEEVERAM TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. VIJAYARĀGHAVA-PERUMĀḶ TEMPLE-ON THE NORTH BASE OF THE MAṆḌAPA IN FRONT OF THE SAME SHRINE.

summary.p: This inscription registers the gift of money for the supply of sacred things to the temple of Pōrēṟṟu nayiṉār for worshiping on the occasion of the Ēkādaśi days for the merit of a certain Veṅgappāpiḷḷai by Rāmayyaṉ, the son of Tāmalmañjar, belonging to Kāsyappagōtra of Muḍippaṇi Agaram.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī cupakiravaruṣam kāttikai 10 2 rūpāy tiruppuṭkuḻi poreṟṟu nayiṉār koyili keḻvik kecavajiya rūpāy
śrīpaṇṭārattārum nīdrava kāśyapagotrattu muṭippaṇi Akarattu tāmal mañcar puttiṟaṉā yirāmayaṉukku poliyūṭṭu sāsanam paṇṇikkuṭuttapaṭi tām veṅkappā piḷḷaikkup puṇṇiyamākat tām viṭutta peruvaḻilam
maiyil Uṟpaṉṉam koṇṭu yekātecippaṭikku Āḷ Oṉṟukku nālu taṉikai tiruppāṉāmum Oru Appa pāṭiyum Iraṇṭu vaṭaippaṭṭi ṉālu palam cantaṉamum tirukkai vaḻakkattukku paṇam Oṉṟum tiruolakkattu
kku Eṇṇaikku paṇam Araikkum tāmaviṭṭavaḻi makamai śrī paṇṭārattile kaykkoṇṭu yintavaḻi makamai Uṟpaṉṉam koṇṭu tiruekāteci Upaiyam naṭatta kaṭaivomākavum viṭṭavaṉ viḻukkāṭu ṉālil Oṉṟum tamakku
naṭattik koṇṭu varakkaṭavomākavum yinta piṟakārattukku cantānaparamparai cantirātittavaraiyum naṭattak kaṭaiva
Digital edition of SII 39.166 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
